2604.14246.title: Awakening Dormant Experts:Counterfactual Routing to Mitigate MoE Hallucinations
2604.14246.paper_summary: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models have achieved remarkable scalability, yet they remain vulnerable to hallucinations, particularly when processing long-tail knowledge. We identify that this fragility stems from static Top-$k$ routing: routers tend to favor high-frequency patterns over rare factual associations. Consequently, ``specialist experts'' possessing critical long-tail knowledge are often assigned low gating scores and remain ``dormant'' -- under-prioritized for specific tokens despite their proven causal importance on other inputs. To address this, we propose Counterfactual Routing (CoR), a training-free inference framework designed to awaken these dormant experts. CoR integrates layer-wise perturbation analysis with the Counterfactual Expert Impact (CEI) metric to dynamically shift computational resources from syntax-dominant to knowledge-intensive layers while maintaining a constant total activation count, effectively retrieving causally decisive experts via virtual ablation. Extensive experiments on TruthfulQA, FACTOR, and TriviaQA demonstrate that CoR improves factual accuracy by 3.1\% on average without increasing the inference budget, establishing a superior Pareto frontier compared to static scaling strategies.
2604.14246.paper_summary_zh: 稀疏的專家混合（MoE）模型已實現了顯著的可擴展性，但在處理長尾知識時仍然容易出現幻覺。我們發現這種脆弱性源於靜態的 Top-$k$ 路由：路由器傾向於偏好高頻模式而非稀有的事實關聯。因此，擁有關鍵長尾知識的「專家專家」經常被分配低的閘控分數，並保持「休眠」狀態——儘管它們在其他輸入上具有明顯的因果重要性，但在特定標記上卻被低估。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了反事實路由（CoR），這是一種無需訓練的推理框架，旨在喚醒這些休眠的專家。CoR 將層級擾動分析與反事實專家影響（CEI）指標結合，動態地將計算資源從語法主導的層轉移到知識密集的層，同時保持總激活計數不變，通過虛擬消融有效地檢索因果決定性的專家。在 TruthfulQA、FACTOR 和 TriviaQA 上的廣泛實驗表明，CoR 在不增加推理預算的情況下，平均提高了 3.1\% 的事實準確性，建立了與靜態擴展策略相比的優越 Pareto 邊界。
2604.14246.author: Wentao Hu et.al.
2604.14246.authors: Wentao Hu, Yanbo Zhai, Xiaohui Hu, Mingkuan Zhao, Shanhong yu, Xue Liu, Kaidong Yu, Shuangyong Song, Xuelong Li
